raw_consumer_statement:
American Express approved XXXX fraud dispute but denied XXXX others for the EXACT SAME FRAUD by the same merchant. This is discriminatory and legally indefensible. 

MERCHANT XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX  ) TOTAL FRAUD : {$52000.00} I paid for " XXXX XXXX XXXX '' XXXX shops that were never delivered. After XXXX  months, I received either nothing or non-functional websites generating {$0.00} revenue. 

I filed XXXX disputes for : XXXX. Dispute XXXX : {$3400.00} - APPROVED BY AMEX ( XX/XX/XXXX ) XXXX. Dispute XXXX : {$21000.00} - DENIED citing " XXXX rule '' XXXX. Dispute XXXX : {$21000.00} - DENIED citing " XXXX rule '' THE PROBLEM : American Express CONFIRMED FRAUD XXXX XXXX approving the {$3400.00} dispute. They found XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX deliver services. Yet they denied the other XXXX disputes for the IDENTICAL FRAUD, same merchant, same non-delivery, same evidence. 

This is arbitrary and capricious. They can not find a merchant committed fraud for XXXX charge but not for identical services. The XXXX rule can not apply selectively - either fraud occurred or it didn't. 

EVIDENCE : - Contract promised delivery in XXXX  months ( by XX/XX/XXXX ) - Merchant admitted in writing : " XXXX sales processed '' ( XX/XX/XXXX ) - Shop XXXX XXXX XXXX Non-functional, {$0.00} revenue - Shop XXXX XXXX XXXX Never delivered - I filed disputes immediately upon discovering fraud RESOLUTION REQUESTED : XXXX. XXXX reversal of denied disputes XXXX and XXXX XXXX. Full refund of {$43000.00} ( matching their fraud finding on identical service ) XXXX. Investigation into American Express 's inconsistent application of dispute policies I've already filed for arbitration due to this discriminatory treatment. American Express is protecting a fraudulent merchant while selectively denying legitimate consumer protections.
